message:
fix: Windows compatibility - use comptime for platform-specific code

- fileobject.zig: Use {any} format for file descriptors (works for both int and HANDLE)
- build_dirs.zig: Use USERPROFILE on Windows, HOME on POSIX (comptime branching)
- incremental.zig: Use USERPROFILE on Windows, HOME on POSIX (comptime branching)

Each platform gets the best native solution via comptime.
